sky.football.uk.description: Charlton Athletic play host to Stoke City at the Valley in the Sky Bet Championship. (11.02)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 25/26: Derby County v Ipswich
sky.football.uk.description: After running riot at Ashton Gate, Derby return home for the Championship visit of Ipswich, with Kieran McKenna's men eyeing a return to form in their bid to secure promotion. (07.02)

sky.football.uk.title: Bundesliga Weekly
sky.football.uk.description: A preview ahead of the weekend's Bundesliga action from the 2025-2026 German top-flight season.

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 25/26: Birmingham v West Brom
sky.football.uk.description: As Birmingham City's play-off push gathers pace, can West Brom dent the ambitions of their rivals and improve their own chances of Sky Bet Championship survival here at St Andrew's? (10.02)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 25/26: Swindon Town v Newport
sky.football.uk.description: Swindon Town play host to Newport County in Sky Bet League Two. (11.02)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 25/26:Hull City v Bristol City
sky.football.uk.description: Hull City play host to Bristol City at the MKM Stadium in the Premier League. (07.02)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 25/26: Wrexham v Millwall
sky.football.uk.description: Wrexham play host to Millwall at the SToK Racecourse in the Sky Bet Championship. (07.02)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL Cup Semi Final Highlights
sky.football.uk.description: Trailing 3-2 on aggregate, Liam Rosenior's Chelsea head to the Emirates Stadium for the second leg of this two-legged Carabao Cup semi-final clash with Mikel Arteta's Arsenal. (03.02)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL Cup Semi Final Highlights
sky.football.uk.description: Two goals up and in firm control of this EFL Cup semi-final tie, Manchester City look to finish off the holders Newcastle and join Premier League title rivals Arsenal at Wembley. (04.02)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL League One Goals
sky.football.uk.description: A round-up of the Sky Bet League One goals from the latest batch of fixtures during the 2025-26 season.

sky.football.uk.title: EFL League Two Goals
sky.football.uk.description: A round-up of the Sky Bet League Two goals from the latest batch of fixtures during the 2025-26 season.

sky.football.uk.title: WSL: Leicester City v Man Utd
sky.football.uk.description: Leicester City and Manchester United get the weekend's Barclays Women's Super League action underway. United moved up to second with a 3-1 victory over Liverpool previously. (07.02)

sky.football.uk.title: WSL: Arsenal v Manchester City
sky.football.uk.description: With one hand on the Barclays Women's Super League trophy, leaders Manchester City travel to play winners of the inaugural Women's Champions Cup, Arsenal. (08.02)

sky.football.uk.title: Scottish Premiership Round Up Show
sky.football.uk.description: A round-up of the goals from the latest weekend of Scottish Premiership action during the 2025-26 season.

sky.football.uk.title: SPFL 25/26: Motherwell v Rangers
sky.football.uk.description: Fourth-placed Motherwell host title hopefuls Rangers. Six points adrift from the Scottish Premiership leaders Hearts, can Rangers close the gap with a positive result at Fir Park? (11.02)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Swindon v Sheff Utd
sky.football.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, Swindon Town host Sheffield United at the County Ground in a 10-goal thriller in the play-offs back in May 2015.

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Norwich v Ipswich
sky.football.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, East Anglian rivals Norwich City and Ipswich Town meet at Carrow Road in the Sky Bet play-offs in May 2015.

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 13/14: Sheff Weds v Leeds Utd
sky.football.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the Football League. Here, Yorkshire rivals Sheffield Wednesday and Leeds United meet at Hillsborough in January 2014 in a memorable game for the Owls.

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 13/14: Derby County v N.Forest
sky.football.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Derby County meet Nottingham Forest in the Sky Bet Championship.

sky.tennis.uk.title: Live: ATP Tennis
sky.tennis.uk.description: Ben Shelton makes a start in Dallas as he plays Gabriel Diallo. Grigor Dimitrov faces Alex Michelsen as Camilo Ugo Carabelli meets Francisco Comesana in an all-Argentine Buenos Aires clash.

sky.tennis.uk.title: Live: ATP Dallas
sky.tennis.uk.description: Taylor Fritz embarks on his fourth Dallas Open campaign, getting underway against fellow American Marcos Giron. Reigning champion Denis Shapovalov plays teenage Spaniard Rafael Jodar.

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Indian Wells
sky.tennis.uk.description: Britain's Jack Draper competes in his maiden ATP Masters 1000 final at Indian Wells as the top-10 bound Brit faces Holger Rune. Draper knocked out Carlos Alcaraz in the last four. (16.03)

sky.tennis.uk.title: WTA Final: Doha
sky.tennis.uk.description: Jelena Ostapenko's near seven-year wait to vie for a WTA 1000 title ends in Doha, as the former Grand Slam champion faces 23-year-old American Amanda Anisimova in an unseeded final. (15.02)

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Miami
sky.tennis.uk.description: Chasing a record seventh men's Miami crown, Novak Djokovic - now the oldest ATP Masters 1000 finalist - takes on Jakub Mensik, aiming to win his first tour-level trophy. (30.03)

sky.tennis.uk.title: WTA Final: Dubai
sky.tennis.uk.description: A women's singles champion is crowned in Dubai. Mirra Andreeva - the youngest-ever WTA finalist - and Denmark's Clara Tauson face off for glory. (22.02)

sky.tennis.uk.title: Tennis Highlights
sky.tennis.uk.description: World number five Coco Gauff, seeded fourth at the Qatar Open, looks to bounce back in Doha after Australian Open disappointment as the American plays Elisabetta Cocciaretto. (10.02)

sky.tennis.uk.title: Tennis Highlights
sky.tennis.uk.description: Three-time Qatar Open champion Iga Swiatek launches her latest bid for success in the Middle East as the Polish top seed gets up and running against Janice Tjen. (10.02)

sky.tennis.uk.title: Live: ATP/WTA Tennis
sky.tennis.uk.description: Teenage stars Mirra Andreeva and Victoria Mboko meet again as Australian Open champion Elena Rybakina faces Qinwen Zheng. Iga Swiatek, Stan Wawrinka and Felix Auger-Aliassime all feature.

sky.tennis.uk.title: Live: ATP Tennis
sky.tennis.uk.description: Joao Fonseca starts his Buenos Aires defence against Alejandro Tabilo, while Argentine top seed Francisco Cerundolo plays Hugo Dellien. Dutchman Tallon Griekspoor features on home soil.

sky.tennis.uk.title: Live: ATP Dallas
sky.tennis.uk.description: As the Dallas top seed Taylor Fritz goes up against Brandon Nakashima for a quarter-final spot, Frances Tiafoe and Sebastian Korda lock horns in an all-American last-16 clash of their own.

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Monte Carlo
sky.tennis.uk.description: Chasing a sixth ATP 1000 title and a first in Monte-Carlo, 21-year-old Spaniard Carlos Alcaraz competes in a blockbuster clash with first-time Masters finalist Lorenzo Musetti. (13.04)

sky.tennis.uk.title: WTA Final: Indian Wells
sky.tennis.uk.description: Mirra Andreeva meets top seed Aryna Sabalenka in the Indian Wells final. Sabalenka avenged her Australian Open defeat to Keys in the semis, while Andreeva dethroned Swiatek. (16.03)

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Madrid
sky.tennis.uk.description: Britain's Jack Draper steps on court for the Madrid Open final aiming to lift his second Masters 1000 crown, as the 23-year-old faces 14th seed Casper Ruud for the first time. (04.05)

sky.tennis.uk.title: WTA Final: Miami
sky.tennis.uk.description: In Miami, the women's final get underway as top seed Aryna Sabalenka meets with home favourite Jessica Pegula in a repeat of last year's US Open decider. (29.03)

sky.tennis.uk.title: Tennis Highlights
sky.tennis.uk.description: Mirra Andreeva and Victoria Mboko run it back in Qatar as the two teenage stars meet in a rematch of the Adelaide final, where Andreeva captured her first WTA 500 title. (11.02)

sky.tennis.uk.title: Tennis Highlights
sky.tennis.uk.description: A champion here in 2022, Canada's Felix Auger-Aliassime returns to Rotterdam for another stab at glory, with the second seed opening his campaign against Australian Alexei Popyrin. (11.02)

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Rome
sky.tennis.uk.description: World number one Jannik Sinner takes on soon-to-be world number two Carlos Alcaraz in a blockbuster Italian Open final. Between them, the pair have won the last five majors. (18.05)

sky.tennis.uk.title: WTA Final: Madrid
sky.tennis.uk.description: In a repeat of the 2023 US Open final, two-time Madrid champion Aryna Sabalenka eyes another marquee title against Coco Gauff, who won their only prior clay-court meeting. (03.05)

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Toronto
sky.tennis.uk.description: Ben Shelton features in his first ATP Masters final as the 22-year-old eyes world number six status against Karen Khachanov, who ends a seven-year wait to compete on this stage. (07.08)

sky.tennis.uk.title: WTA Final: Rome
sky.tennis.uk.description: A women's singles champion is crowned at the Italian Open, as home favourite and world number five Jasmine Paolini faces the American Coco Gauff. (17.05)

sky.mix.uk.title: NFL Super Bowl Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: One of sport's biggest events arrives as Tom Brady and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers face Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs for the Vince Lombardi Trophy at Super Bowl LV.

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: The final day of the 2026 WM Phoenix Open at TPC Scottsdale in Arizona. Thomas Detry claimed his maiden PGA Tour win here last season, becoming the first Belgian to do so. (08.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games: Liv v Eve 19/20
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Merseyside rivals Liverpool and Everton go head-to-head at Anfield in a game that was packed full of goals.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games: Wol v MC 19/20
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Wolves welcome reigning champions Man City to Molineux for a thrilling tussle in the 2019-20 campaign.

sky.mix.uk.title: Premier League Greatest Games
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, West Ham United welcome Brighton & Hove Albion to London Stadium for a thrilling tussle in the 2019-20 campaign.

sky.mix.uk.title: Premier League Greatest Games
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here Liverpool, who have yet to lose a game this season, and Watford meet at Vicarage Road in the 2019-20 campaign.

sky.mix.uk.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at Spa. With eyes on the weather, Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri lock out the front, while Charles Leclerc starts P3. Lewis Hamilton bids to fight through the field. (27.07)

sky.mix.uk.title: Hungarian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at the Hungaroring. As Charles Leclerc goes up against the McLarens from pole, both Max Verstappen and Lewis Hamilton face tough recovery drives from further back. (03.08)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 18/19:Leeds Utd v Derby County
sky.mix.uk.description: Frank Lampard's Derby go to Elland Road for the second leg of their 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final with Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds, with the odds stacked against them.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster
sky.mix.uk.description: Two matches of Sky Bet League 1 semi-final play-off action couldn't separate Charlton Athletic and Doncaster Rovers in 2019, as a date at Wembley hinged on a dramatic penalty shootout.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 21/22: Coventry City v Fulham
sky.mix.uk.description: In October 2021, Coventry took Fulham to the sword, putting four past the travelling west Londoners who eventually went on to secure Premier League promotion.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 21/22: Blackburn v Fulham
sky.mix.uk.description: In a Sky Bet Championship encounter to remember for the visitors - and one to forget for the hosts - the travelling Fulham put seven unanswered goals past a hapless Blackburn at Ewood Park.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: Saving four match points in the process, Roger Federer was pushed to the limit in his 2014 ATP Finals semi-final meeting with fellow Swiss superstar Stan Wawrinka.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a three-hour test of wills, Justine Henin was bidding to close an up-and-down year with the defence of her WTA Finals title against Maria Sharapova in 2007.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL Play-Off Memories: 1999
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic play-off final from the English Football League. Here, rewind to 1999 and a memorable encounter between Gillingham and Manchester City.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL Play-Off Memories: 1998
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic play-off final from the English Football League. Here, rewind to 1998, and a fascinating, pulsating eight-goal encounter between Sunderland and Charlton.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 97/98: Charlton v Sunderland
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic clash from the English Football League - here, rewind to May 1998 for the First Division play-off final at Wembley, as Charlton met Sunderland in an eight-goal thriller.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: Arsenal v Man City
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL Cup. Here, Arsenal and Man City go head-to-head in the final of the 2017-18 competition at Wembley.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Darts: Newcastle
sky.mix.uk.description: The weekly darting roadshow returns with reigning Premier League champion Luke Humphries beginning his defence against Gerwyn Price. Luke Littler and Gian van Veen renew their rivalry.

sky.mix.uk.title: S/Lge: St Helens v Hull KR
sky.mix.uk.description: Two of the three remaining unbeaten teams this Betfred Super League season go toe to toe, as Paul Wellens' third-round table-topping Saints welcome Willie Peters' perfect Hull KR.

sky.mix.uk.title: WSL: Leicester City v Man Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: Leicester City and Manchester United get the weekend's Barclays Women's Super League action underway. United moved up to second with a 3-1 victory over Liverpool previously. (07.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:ManU v Spurs '09
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, a look back to 2009 and a seven-goal thriller between Manchester United and Spurs at Old Trafford.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 13/14: QPR v N. Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, QPR host Nottingham Forest at Loftus Road in the 2013-14 season in a seven-goal thriller.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Brentford v Fulham
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, a west London derby in the Sky Bet Championship between Brentford and Fulham at Griffin Park in November 2014.

sky.mix.uk.title: Live Testing: Bahrain Day 1
sky.mix.uk.description: The opening day of Formula 1 pre-season testing enters its final hour as the teams and drivers get to grips with the new-for-2026 cars around Bahrain International Circuit.

sky.mix.uk.title: The Story of the 2025 Season
sky.mix.uk.description: This is the story of the 2025 F1 world championship - an unforgettable one for those stood tall at the end, full of twists and turns in the race the drivers' and constructors' titles.

sky.mix.uk.title: Lando Norris's Career
sky.mix.uk.description: With the Brit ultimately clinching his maiden world title in Abu Dhabi, take a look at the career of McLaren's Lando Norris heading into the decider in the desert.

sky.mix.uk.title: Premier League Greatest Games
sky.mix.uk.description: Take a look back at Leicester City's record-equalling 9-0 demolition of the Saints during the 2019-20 Premier League season, as the Foxes tore 10-man Southampton to shreds.

sky.mix.uk.title: Premier League Greatest Games
sky.mix.uk.description: Revisit a classic serving of Premier League action, as West Ham and a struggling Newcastle United came to blows during the 2019-20 campaign.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Montpellier
sky.mix.uk.description: In defence of the Montpellier title, Felix Auger-Aliassime makes a return to the final - his 21st overall - as the Canadian top seed plays 37-year-old Frenchman Adrian Mannarino. (08.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Darts: Newcastle
sky.mix.uk.description: The weekly darting roadshow returns with reigning Premier League champion Luke Humphries beginning his defence against Gerwyn Price. Luke Littler and Gian van Veen renew their rivalry.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Tour This Week
sky.mix.uk.description: Step behind the scenes of men's professional tennis throughout the 2026 season on the ATP Tour with special features, interviews and much more.

sky.mix.uk.title: WTA Final: Ostrava
sky.mix.uk.description: Katie Boulter targets her fourth career title as the former world number 23 faces Germany's Tamara Korpatsch in the Ostrava final. Boulter will return to the top 100 with victory. (07.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: WTA Final: Abu Dhabi
sky.mix.uk.description: Securing her place in a 13th career final and with it a return to the world's top 10, Abu Dhabi second seed Ekaterina Alexandrova meets a first-time finalist, qualifier Sara Bejlek. (07.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Spurs/Chelsea 08
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Spurs and Chelsea go head-to-head at White Hart Lane in an end-to-end encounter that produced eight goals.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Man Utd/Man City
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the Premier League. Here, a memorable Manchester derby at Old Trafford back in the 2011-12 season that saw a six-goal Man City run rampant.

sky.mix.uk.title: Dutch F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out in Zandvoort. Pipping his team mate to pole, Oscar Piastri leads Lando Norris as Max Verstappen looks to spring a surprise from P3 with Isack Hadjar for company. (31.08)

sky.mix.uk.title: Italian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at Monza. Max Verstappen holds pole from title contenders Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri as Charles Leclerc leads the Ferrari charge with Lewis Hamilton down in P10. (07.09)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 98/99: Gillingham v Man City
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, remember the thrilling 1998-99 Second Division play-off final between Gillingham and Manchester City at Wembley.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 98/99: Bolton v Watford
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, Bolton Wanderers and Watford face off in the First Division play-off final at Wembley back in 1999.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 00/01: Bolton v Preston
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the Football League. Here, Bolton Wanderers and Preston North End meet in the First Division play-off final at the Millennium Stadium back in 2001.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 02/03: Sheff Utd v Wolves
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic English Football League clash. Here, Sheffield United and Wolves meet in the First Division play-off final at the Millennium Stadium in Cardiff back in 2003.

BBCAlba.uk.title: Trusadh - Air na Busaichean/On the Buses
BBCAlba.uk.description: 4/14. A' coimhead air ais air buaidh nam busaichean air feadh na Gàidhealtachd 's nan Eilean. A nostalgic look back at life on the buses in the Highlands and Islands. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Machair
BBCAlba.uk.description: 11/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.

BBCAlba.uk.title: Fraochy Bay
BBCAlba.uk.description: 6/10. A casino gets built in Fraochy Bay and everyone goes gambling mad. It proves too much for the banker however and trouble soon ensues.

BBCAlba.uk.title: Alleluia!
BBCAlba.uk.description: 1/6. Iain MacKinnon reads excerpts from Gliocas bhon Bhioball by Donald Saunders, and Mairi MacInnes narrates from The Mother's Catechism. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Alba Today
BBCAlba.uk.description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

BBCAlba.uk.title: Alba Today
BBCAlba.uk.description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

BBCAlba.uk.title: Oscar & Ealasaid
BBCAlba.uk.description: 5/8. One morning, Celestine discovers the town is deserted. Where has everyone gone? [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Beathaichean a' Bocadaich
BBCAlba.uk.description: 1/15. Tha Sophie agus a caraidean a' bocadaich coltach ri cearc agus sìota. Sophie and her friends dance like a chicken and a cheetah. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Orain CBeebies
BBCAlba.uk.description: 6/7. Òrain mu dhiofar ainmhidhean bho Carrie, Linda, Ruairidh agus sgioba CBeebies ALBA. A selection of animal songs from Carrie, Linda, Ruairidh and the CBeebies ALBA presenters. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Peataichean/Pets
BBCAlba.uk.description: 9/15. Eilidh Cormack meets Sophie and her guinea pigs, Timmy and Max. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Treubh an Tuathanais (Big Barn Farm)
BBCAlba.uk.description: 19/20. Tha a h-uile duine trang an-diugh ach chan eil duine nas trainge na na cearcan. Everyone is occupied today but no one is busier than the hens. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Gasta a' Ghraineag/Happy the Hoglet
BBCAlba.uk.description: 26/26. Tha an t-uisg' a' cur bacadh air Gasta, oir chan fhaigh e air 'dathan' a chluich' a-muigh. The rain hinders Gasta from playing 'colours' outside today. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: 'S E Iasg a Th'Annam (I'm a Fish)
BBCAlba.uk.description: 50/52. Tha Gibearnach ag innse mu dèidhinn fhèin an-diugh. A Squid tells all about herself today. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Stòiridh
BBCAlba.uk.description: 13/80. Martainn Mac an t-Saoir a' leughadh Am Balach a bha ag Ithe Leabhraichean. Martin MacIntyre reads Am Balach a bha ag Ithe Leabhraichean. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Clann na Cruinne
BBCAlba.uk.description: 10/12. The Veronika 'son a diol còmhla ri Granaidh air turas sònraichte. Veronika wants to go with Granny on a special trip. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Flix
BBCAlba.uk.description: 6/13. Tha Flix ag ionnsachadh rud no dha bho mhàirneal an-diugh. Flix learns a few things from detention today. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Caractaran CBBC ALBA
BBCAlba.uk.description: 1/3. Ellen a' toirt sùil air ais air cuid de na caractaran iongantach a thadhail air CBBC Alba. Ellen introduces some of the surprising characters who have visited the CBBC Alba studio. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Seonaidh/Shaun the Sheep
BBCAlba.uk.description: 6/20. Bitzer is left to babysit Timmy when the flock head off for a girls' night. But it's not long before the youngster makes it clear who's in charge.

BBCAlba.uk.title: Bogaisean is...
BBCAlba.uk.description: ...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 36/52. Tha Seonaidh is Merri ri miastadh an-diugh. Seonaidh and Merri are up to mischief today. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Fuine
BBCAlba.uk.description: 5/6. Recipes and top baking tips from Gregor MacLeod and friends. Reasapaidhean 's fìor chomhairle fuinidh bho Ghriogair MacLeòid 's a charaidean. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: SpeakGaelic
BBCAlba.uk.description: 18/26. Gordon Maloney is in the studio discussing technology and Gaelic learning, whilst Calum Maclean is in Perthshire at the site of an historic scientific experiment. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: An Là
BBCAlba.uk.description: Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Dealbhan Fraoich
BBCAlba.uk.description: 6/8. Heather Dewar meets Lana Beaton and draws her colour portrait. Fraoch Nic an Deòir cuide ri Lana Peutan agus i dèanamh dealbh dathte dhi. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Glan Fhèin
BBCAlba.uk.description: 3/3. Betty proves how adept she is at blowing her mating call. She is wooed by a celebrity admirer - an outdoorsman who would travel to the ends of the Earth for her. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Conaltradh Creutairean/Wild Talk
BBCAlba.uk.description: 5/5. Sùil air na dòighean iongantach anns a bheil beathaichean a' foillseachadh gluasadan-inntinn. Discovering the surprising ways animals may experience and show emotions. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Brunch le Abigail
BBCAlba.uk.description: 5/12. Chan eil am beatadh air smoothie blasta teòclaid airson brunch. You can't beat a tasty chocolate smoothie brunch. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Plaigh air Bord
BBCAlba.uk.description: Biological warfare experiments off Lewis. Deuchainnean armachd bìth-eòlasach far Leòdhais. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Transatlantic Sessions: Dluth an Daimh
BBCAlba.uk.description: 6/6. Featuring songs from Julie Fowlis along with fellow musical stars, including Martha Wainwright and Liam Ó Maonlaí. Contains some strong language. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Alba Today
BBCAlba.uk.description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

BBCAlba.uk.title: Alba Today
BBCAlba.uk.description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

BBCAlba.uk.title: Bing
BBCAlba.uk.description: 3/104. Tha Bing 's Pando a' gabhail turas mu seach air an dreallag ach tha foighidinn a dhìth. Bing and Pando take turns on the swing, but patience proves to be a challenge. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Bing
BBCAlba.uk.description: 4/104. Tha Bing 'son tùr a thogail le na blocaichean dathach ach tha beachd eile aig Coco... Bing wants to keep building a tower with his colourful blocks, but Coco has other ideas... [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Sionnach agus Maigheach (Fox & Hare)
BBCAlba.uk.description: 5/26. Brush really enjoys her 'wonnnnderful' holiday in the forest, which makes Fox want to go on a holiday as well! [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Cleasan Ataidh & Tilidh/The...
BBCAlba.uk.description: ...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 26/52. Abney's front door is blocked by a huge leaf pile, which Teal has great fun jumping in. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Peicein/Petit
BBCAlba.uk.description: 2/26. To avoid Bruno, who is the bully of the class, Petit decides he has to use the power of invisibility. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Stòiridh
BBCAlba.uk.description: 14/80. Donald Smith reads An Ròn Beag by Janis Mackay, illustrated by Gabby Grant and translated into Gaelic by Jo Macdonald. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: An Doimhne/The Deep
BBCAlba.uk.description: 5/13. Tha creutair mì-àbhaisteach anns an uisge. Dè idir a th' ann? There's an unusual creature in the water. What on earth is it? [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: An Sgoil
BBCAlba.uk.description: 6/6. Leis an teirm a' tighinn gu crìch, tha fadachd air a h-uile duine rèis mhòr nan tidseir fhaicinn. The term is ending, and the school looks forward to the teachers' big race. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: An Saoghal Droil aig Pol...
BBCAlba.uk.description: ...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 37/52. A sweet thief has been reported in Grimsby and the suspect looks strikingly like Dave. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: An Saoghal Droil aig Pol...
BBCAlba.uk.description: ...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 38/52. Dave and Anna nurse a poorly, polluted cloud back to health and teach it how to fly again. [S] [HD]

BBCAlba.uk.title: Vets: Gach Creutair Beo

Channel4Plus1.uk.description: In Oxford, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien get hands-on in a second-hand goods shop. They discover a servant's call bell, and a mysterious pedal-powered tool catches Simon's eye. (S6 Ep4)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Countdown
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Mel Schilling in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: A Place in the Sun
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Maxine and John have been visiting Cyprus for three decades and now want to buy their own holiday home there. Jean Johansson shows them what their £150k can buy.

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: A New Life in the Sun
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: The new series continues. A couple in Romania hope their local food business can boost tourism in the area. A boxing academy in Spain needs to increase its membership. (S11 Ep29)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Chateau DIY: Win the Dream
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: The new series continues. Guest judges Janet and Philip return to help Max assess the character and comfort of the competitors' libraries, before another pair are eliminated. (Ep14/20)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: New: A Place in the Sun
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Laura Hamilton helps Mark and Carrie chase their Cretan dream in Rethymno, where the gorgeous old town boasts terrific tavernas and heaps of history.

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Channel 4 News
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: New: George Clarke's Building Home

Channel4Plus1.uk.description: The trial hangs in the balance, with Jackson facing up to 18 years in prison. But there's pandemonium when he's found not guilty on all counts of sex abuse. (Ep4/4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Motorway

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Railway Map of Britain
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Charting the high and lows of Britain's railway - the invention created at the dawn of the 19th century that would change Britain and the world forever - from the Industrial Revolution to HS2.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Spain with Michael Portillo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: In Andalucia, Michael uncovers Almeria's hidden history - from its vast Alcazaba and desert film sets to crystal caves, coastal sunsets, and a final burst of fandango in the city. (Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: How to Kill Your Boss: A Killer Makes a Call
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: David Browning confesses that he has killed his boss, Jill. But he claims that he is not guilty of murder, on the grounds of diminished responsibility. (S2 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: The Limbs in the Loch: Killer on the Run
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: True-crime series focusing on the hunt for elusive killers. In 1999, a man is found dismembered in Loch Lomond, sparking an intense manhunt for William Beggs. (S1 Ep1)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: My Lover, My Killer
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Kasey Anderson's kind nature is twisted and exploited by Natalie Bennett, whose bitterness and control lead to his murder. (S3 Ep9)

UAndDave.uk.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
UAndDave.uk.description: Comedian and actress Jo Brand takes over the reins for an extended edition of the quiz, with politician Heidi Allen and stand-up Phil Wang joining Ian Hislop and Paul Merton. S57 Ep9

UAndDave.uk.title: Taskmaster
UAndDave.uk.description: My Eyes Are Circles: Five fearless comics continue to battle for Taskmaster Greg Davies's coveted golden bonce. Today: hungry ogres, free money and invisible circles. S7 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.title: Mock the Week
UAndDave.uk.description: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis look back on events with guests Tom Allen, Maff Brown, Ria Lina, Ed Byrne and Rhys James. S19 Ep6

UAndDave.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDave.uk.description: Rob Brydon hosts as more celebrities tell tall tales. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack here are John Bishop, Joanna Page, Chris Addison and Patsy Palmer. S4 Ep5

UAndDave.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDave.uk.description: Gaby Roslin and Tinchy Stryder - together at last. Jack Dee and Romesh Ranganathan also join the regulars for the very witty fact-or-fiction panel show. Rob Brydon hosts. S9 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Battle in the Box
UAndDave.uk.description: Jimmy Carr hosts as Katherine Ryan joins forces with actor and comedian Tom Rosenthal to take on comics and best friends Fatiha El-Ghorri and Josh Jones in the game show. S1 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Battle in the Box
UAndDave.uk.description: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show as Katherine Ryan and Tom Rosenthal reach the halfway point in their battle for freedom against Fatiha El-Ghorri and Josh Jones. S1 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndDave.uk.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
UAndDave.uk.description: Fowl: The Bikers reveal that there is so much more to British fowl than roast chicken, cook up a storm with a duck tikka, and tell the history of Norfolk black turkey. S2 Ep19

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: A large shipment of fake fentanyl pills is intercepted, an automatic rifle is found inside a loudspeaker, and a woman dealing drugs for her boyfriend is captured. S4 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: A truck with a shipment of wet wipes turns out to have a secret hidden inside, and a US citizen is caught with thousands of Tramadol tablets hidden in his hand luggage. S4 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.title: Speed with Guy Martin
UAndDave.uk.description: Human-Powered Aircraft: The motoring fan is on a mission to do the seemingly impossible - fly using muscle power alone and build the world's fastest human-powered aircraft. S1 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
UAndDave.uk.description: Rick Stein approaches the end of his meander through France with a final glance at the culinary delights of the Languedoc, and he makes a confit tomato and aubergine tarte Tatin. S1 Ep6

UAndDave.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndDave.uk.description: Lotus Esprit/MGA: A series of head-turning supercharged cars head to the Mathewson's auction room. Plus, going under Derek's hammer - a Ford Escort XR3 and a beautiful MGA. S5 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndDave.uk.description: Saab 96L/AC Aceca: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of beautiful Swedish models - a Saab 96L and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale. S5 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Extreme Fishing with Robson Green
UAndDave.uk.description: North Australia: The actor fishes for barramundi in the waters of the Carmor Plains Wildlife Reserve in northern Australia and learns how to catch milkfish using a loaf of bread in Darwin. S2 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: High-octane high jinks with Jeremy, Richard and James, plus guest Philip Glenister. The chaps attempt to build a truly amphibious car that works as well on water as it does on land. S8 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: Four-wheeled fun with the overgrown boy racers. Richard travels to Cyprus, where he checks out the new Porsche Cayenne Turbo S. Ewan McGregor is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car. S8 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
UAndDave.uk.description: Francophile: The Bikers continue their culinary journey by looking across the Channel to see how the French have influenced the way we cook and eat over time. S2 Ep20

UAndDave.uk.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
UAndDave.uk.description: Rick Stein approaches the end of his meander through France with a final glance at the culinary delights of the Languedoc, and he makes a confit tomato and aubergine tarte Tatin. S1 Ep6

UAndDave.uk.description: Rob Brydon hosts the sly panel show in which David Mitchell, Lee Mack, Ben Miller, Henning Wehn, Doon Mackichan and Alex Brooker tell plausible lies and improbable truths. S9 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDave.uk.description: Comedian Cally Beaton, actors Louis Emerick and Helen George, and funnyman Justin Moorhouse see if they can come out on top in the Thursday Murder Club's creator's trials. S6 Ep33

UAndDave.uk.description: A woman is caught trying to enter the US with a baby that isn't hers, a man wanted for a serious crime is intercepted, and a driver has a heart attack while crossing a bridge. S4 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.description: Aston DB6/Jaguar E-type: A 1967 Aston Martin DB6 lands at the Mathewsons' - Derek believes it could break the record for the most expensive car ever sold at the auction. S5 Ep9

UAndDave.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndDave.uk.description: Austin Metro/Fiat 850 Coupe: A collection of Austin Mini Metros arrive for auction. Also under the hammer is a baby Fiat 850 coupe and a haulier offloads part of his vintage vehicle collection. S5 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.description: Jezza and the regulars host more petrolhead pandemonium. The trio take an unlikely caravanning holiday in Dorset and The Stig finds out how fast you can drive indoors. S8 Ep6

UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Food and the Empire: The Bikers explore the impact Britain's colonial past has on food, from chai in bread and butter pudding to India pale ale in sausage casserole. S2 Ep13

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: A huge shipment of cocaine is found hidden in the floor of a truck, a young man tries to enter the US to enrol in school, and a woman is caught smuggling fentanyl pills. S4 Ep3

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: A woman is caught trying to enter the US with a baby that isn't hers, a man wanted for a serious crime is intercepted, and a driver has a heart attack while crossing a bridge. S4 Ep4

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Speed with Guy Martin
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: World's Fastest Toboggan: The motorbike racer and mechanic sets out to break the record for the world's fastest gravity-powered sled at the Pista Riberal speed ski slope in the Pyrenees. S1 Ep4

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Bangers & Cash

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Bangers & Cash

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: The boys stage another 'car football' spectacular, pitting the nice little movers known as Toyota Aygos against some Brazilian-built VW Foxes. Actor Michael Gambon guests. S8 Ep5

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Jezza and the regulars host more petrolhead pandemonium. The trio take an unlikely caravanning holiday in Dorset and The Stig finds out how fast you can drive indoors. S8 Ep6

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Hairy Bikers' Chicken and Egg

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Bordeaux: Rick Stein embarks on a series of culinary long weekends in search of food excellence and brilliant recipes - he begins his adventures in autumnal Bordeaux. S1 Ep1

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Comedian Cally Beaton, actors Louis Emerick and Helen George, and funnyman Justin Moorhouse see if they can come out on top in the Thursday Murder Club's creator's trials. S6 Ep34

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates: Be My Valentine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Seeking love on Valentine's are: a 90-year-old army veteran, a TikTok star with a 'dirty builder' thing, and broadcaster India Willoughby on her first date since she transitioned. (S21 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the Box this time, The Outlaws, Family Fortunes, You, Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House, The Mating Game, and ITV News. (S18 Ep8) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Naked Attraction
E4Plus1.uk.description: Recently divorced Leanne wants an experimental guy to share her new-found love of sex and ice cream. Ex-US marine Conor has seen plenty of action but struggles to talk to women. (S7 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Goldbergs Feel Hard: Erica is accepted into a summer arts school, but Murray struggles to express pride in her achievement. Barry becomes the school mascot. (S2 Ep24)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Kick-Ass Risky Business Party: Lainey, Erica and Barry throw a big party but it spirals out of control. (S3 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One at a Rugby Match: Rugby-loving Wes plans the biggest wedding ever, in front of 26,000 people at a rugby match. But bride-to-be Charlotte wants something intimate.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Clash of Swords: Mitchell and fanboy Phil sneak out to Hero-Con in Clash of Swords cosplay. Gloria's dinosaur party for Joe is ruined. (S9 Ep22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: I Love a Parade: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan set off more than a few fireworks at the Fourth of July parade, where Jay's the grand marshal. (S10 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Chappy's: Gordon visits Chappy's in Tennessee, where the chef and owner's careless methods and less-than-appetising food have hurt his restaurant's local reputation. (S6 Ep15) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Amy's Baking Company: At Amy's Baking Company in Scottsdale, Arizona, Gordon Ramsay meets a husband and wife team with a shocking contempt for customer feedback. (S6 Ep11) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Night to Remember: Barry plans romantic gestures for Lainey on prom night, Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together and a nerdy girl asks Adam out. (S4 Ep19)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Dynamic Duo: Barry tries to drive a wedge between Adam and Pops when they discuss a recently released Batman movie. Erica messes up her college interview. (S4 Ep20)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Dear Beloved Family: Gloria rushes Phil to hospital for emergency surgery when he experiences intense stomach pains. (S9 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: In Your Head: Luke goes missing after a night out. Can Manny, Phil and Gloria find him? Haley tries to land an interview with the creator of a big lifestyle website. (S9 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Return to Amy's Baking Company: Gordon revisits the most contentious restaurant he's ever tried to rescue - Amy's Baking Company, in Scottsdale, Arizona. (S7 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Pantaleone's: In Colorado, Gordon visits Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, whose stubborn owner Pete claims that he makes 'the best pizza in Denver'. Sadly, Gordon doesn't agree. (S7 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Oolong Slayer: Peralta enlists Captain Holt's help while investigating a serial killer. Diaz and Santiago are forced to deal with The Vulture's demands. (S3 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Halloween III: The third instalment of Peralta and Holt's 'Halloween heist' involves a tie-breaking contest to be crowned Amazing Detective Slash Genius. (S3 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Burns, Baby Burns: Homer concocts a scam with Mr Burns' long-lost illegitimate son Larry (guest star Rodney Dangerfield). (S8 Ep4/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bart After Dark: Bart gets a job at a burlesque theatre. Several residents are keen customers, but others aren't happy to have the showgirls peddling their wares in Springfield. (S8 Ep5/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Girl Talk: Murray's furniture shop faces big competition from a rival. Beverly gives Barry her advice when his attempts to court a girl at school end in failure. (S5 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Wall Street Thanksgiving: Murray has to intervene when Marvin reveals that he's become a stockbroker and convinces Barry and his friends to invest money with him. (S5 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: I Love a Parade: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan set off more than a few fireworks at the Fourth of July parade, where Jay's the grand marshal. (S10 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Kiss and Tell: Haley asks Mitch and Cam for advice about whether she should tell Arvin about her kiss with Dylan. And Gloria suspects that Manny's Canadian girlfriend isn't real. (S10 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Karen Peralta: On his birthday, Peralta takes Santiago to meet his mother. Diaz and Boyle struggle to deal with a new mandate on body cams during a stakeout. (S3 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The 9-8: Peralta is reunited with his old partner when the Nine-Nine have to host officers from the Nine-Eight precinct because of a flood. (S3 Ep15)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Itchy & Scratchy & Poochie Show: Homer gets a job on The Itchy & Scratchy Show as the voice of hip-hop surfer dog Poochie, a character brought in to boost viewing figures. (S8 Ep14/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer's Phobia: Homer's prejudices surface when Bart befriends a gay shop owner (guest star John Waters). So he decides to take Bart hunting - but it doesn't go to plan. (S8 Ep15/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brand new series - P.S. I Hate You: Marge's reputation as Springfield's nicest resident is jeopardised when her secret stash of vitriolic letters is stolen during a house party. (S36 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Friend with Benefit: When Lisa becomes friends with Harper, a new girl at school whose family are extremely wealthy, Homer befriends Harper's father. (S27 Ep6/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates: Valentine's Special
E4Plus1.uk.description: Chi-Chi and her son Kurtis visit the restaurant together: can she resist interfering in his date with Jaleesa? And Danny discovers that his date's best friend is First Dates waiter Laura.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Meet the Fockers
E4Plus1.uk.description: (2004) Comedy sequel. What happens when an ex-CIA prude and ageing, sexually liberated hippies become in-laws? Robert De Niro, Barbara Streisand and Dustin Hoffman show you what happens.

Film4.uk.title: The Drop
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Tense thriller with Tom Hardy, James Gandolfini, Noomi Rapace and Matthias Schoenaerts. Two cousins get into trouble with the gangsters who use their bar to launder illicit cash.

Film4.uk.title: Heat and Dust
Film4.uk.description: (1982) Drama with Julie Christie. A woman travels to India to learn about the scandal her great aunt was involved in 60 years earlier. Upsetting scenes/attitudes of the era that may offend.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Hell and High Water
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Cold War thriller. Richard Widmark stars as the leader of a submarine expedition, sent to the frozen depths of Alaska to thwart the Chinese communists' plans to start WWIII.

Film4.uk.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
Film4.uk.description: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

Film4.uk.title: Broken Lance
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

Film4.uk.title: Destroyer
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

Film4.uk.title: Battleship
Film4.uk.description: (2012) Sci-fi action-adventure starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Rihanna. When aliens land spacecraft in the Pacific Ocean, only the US and Japanese navies can save Earth. Violence.

Film4.uk.title: The Pope's Exorcist
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

Film4.uk.title: 3:10 to Yuma
Film4.uk.description: (2007) Western starring Christian Bale and Russell Crowe. An impoverished rancher tries to earn some money and his family's respect by escorting a dangerous outlaw on his way to jail.

Film4.uk.title: Bros
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Billy Eichner stars in the first studio gay romcom as a cynical monogamophobe who - in spite of himself - might just fall in love with hunky Hallmark Channel alumnus Luke Macfarlane.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Virginian
Film4.uk.description: (1946) Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

Film4.uk.title: Criss Cross
Film4.uk.description: (1949) Muscular film noir starring Burt Lancaster and Yvonne De Carlo. A dame convinces her ex-husband, an armoured car guard, to come in on a daring robbery.

Film4.uk.title: One Day Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Stars Anne Hathaway and Jim Sturgess and director Lone Scherfig talk about making the big-screen adaptation of the best-selling novel One Day.

Film4.uk.title: Shadow of a Doubt
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Hitchcock thriller starring Joseph Cotten as a serial killer fleeing the law. Teresa Wright is his adoring niece who, initially, refuses to believe her uncle is a murderer.

Film4.uk.title: Lifeboat
Film4.uk.description: (1944) Alfred Hitchcock's Oscar-nominated Second World War drama starring Tallulah Bankhead, William Bendix and Walter Slezak as three of the survivors from a liner torpedoed by the Nazis.

Film4.uk.title: Fisherman's Friends
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

Film4.uk.title: The Other Woman
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Romcom starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau. Three women take revenge on the man who betrayed their love. Strong language, scenes that may offend.

Film4.uk.title: Wuthering Heights
Film4.uk.description: (2011) Andrea Arnold's radical adaptation of Emily Brontë's classic novel of obsessive love, anger and revenge on the weather-beaten Yorkshire moors. With Kaya Scodelario and James Howson.

Film4.uk.title: Smoke Sauna Sisterhood
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Anna Hints's award-winning and insightful documentary centres around a group of women taking traditional smoke saunas over a period of time, in the depths of an Estonian forest.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Animal Farm
Film4.uk.description: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

Film4.uk.title: Written on the Wind
Film4.uk.description: (1956) Lauren Bacall, Robert Stack, Rock Hudson and Dorothy Malone star in Douglas Sirk's drama, a commentary on 1950s life that's disguised as a lurid, glossy soap opera.

Film4.uk.title: Sink the Bismarck!
Film4.uk.description: (1960) Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

Film4.uk.title: The Comancheros
Film4.uk.description: (1961) Western starring John Wayne and Stuart Whitman. A Texas Ranger is forced to team up with his prisoner while he's on a covert mission to take on a band of thieves and gunrunners.

Film4.uk.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
Film4.uk.description: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

Film4.uk.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
Film4.uk.description: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

Film4.uk.title: Babylon
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Margot Robbie and Brad Pitt star in Damien Chazelle's opulently decadent, satirical look at Hollywood in the 1920s as it teeters between the silent the era and the 'talkies'.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Alice, Darling
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2022) Provocative psychological thriller with Anna Kendrick. A woman's friends stage an intervention to get her to see she's in a controlling relationship. But what will the boyfriend do?

Film4Plus1.uk.title: The Drop

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Werner von Braun: A look at Werner von Braun, the gifted young scientist whose ambition led him to abandon any sense of morality in pursuit of his dream of space flight. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Eden Project 2: Fiona Bruce presents the show from the Eden Project in Cornwall, where items include fragments of hair from Samuel Taylor Coleridge. S45 Ep18

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Fastback / Norton: The team's first purchase is a 1972 VW Fastback, and the second project sees them pick up a 40-year-old police bike. S6 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Riley Falcon: Dave's in Lincolnshire picking up a 1935 Riley Falcon - a good-looking saloon car, with a pre-select gearbox. S8 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Global Icons: Bizarrely-shaped huts in India, once home to global superstars, are now eerily quiet and neglected, and a shattered compound in Colombia linked to a criminal mastermind. S7 Ep12

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Rumble in the Jungle: The home of an African dictator and a sporting hero - and the facility that held apartheid's greatest critic - are abandoned but still have unique stories to tell. S8 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Schenectady to Niagara Falls: Michael Portillo travels across New York state, discovering how General Electric also leads the way in rail technology. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Austin Gipsy / Toyota MR2 Ferrari: Derek heads to Scotland in a rainstorm to pick up a Jaguar E-type and a rare MGC convertible, and Dave extracts a rare Austin Gipsey from a lock-up. S5 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ford Thames 400E/Vauxhall Astra: Derek collects a Ford Thames 400E that once belonged to the pop band Edison Lighthouse. Plus, Dave heads to York to collect an Astra GTE convertible. S5 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Heinrich Himmler: An in-depth profile of Heinrich Himmler, the book-loving loner whose strange mystical beliefs drove him to carry out the most shocking act of genocide in human history. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: A Secret to Win the War: In 1942, a mysterious technology is facilitating a deadly Blitz. Desperate for answers, British intelligence sets its sights on an installation in Bruneval, France. S4 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Powis Castle and Garden, Welshpool 3: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Powis Castle, where treasures include a Scottish landscape bought for 20 pounds. S45 Ep20

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Castle Howard 1: The programme embarks on its 40th anniversary tour by paying a visit to the stately home of Castle Howard, near York. Presented by Fiona Bruce. S40 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: 1954 Morgan Plus 4 Coupe: Derek heads north to pick up a 1954 Morgan Plus 4 coupe in mint condition and believed to be just one of three still on the road. S8 Ep7
